title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: Google DeepMind released a video retrospective on the 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo's 2016 victory over Lee Sedol in Go, featuring VP Pushmeet Kohli and Distinguished Research Scientist Thore Graepel. The commentary frames AlphaGo as a watershed moment that sparked the modern AI revolution, leading to subsequent advances in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
